untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of shadow heights to market-condition-specific median thresholds from 'table for your market condition and breakout direction' which is not provided as a structured input. The rule also requires identifying Abandoned Baby candlestick pattern (3-candle formation) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. Additionally, the signal requires dynamic regime detection (bull/bear market, up/down breakout context) that exceeds the available regime types.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence of shadow analysis using upper_wick and lower_wick indicators, but the core logic depends on: (1) unprovided median reference tables, (2) multi-candle pattern recognition not available in indicator set, (3) market regime/breakout direction classifications beyond TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN. The signal is inherently context-dependent and requires external parameter tables to function correctly.
